name: 15 · Stream Python Body
description: Per-chunk Python body on a StreamConsumer (dispatch=SequentialBody). A producer AutomatedStep with streamOutput=true emits 4 word chunks (the/quick/brown/fox); the consumer dispatches one Python body run per chunk, one at a time in stream order (the sequential permit + next-expected-sequence gate), each body uppercasing its chunk; the Concat reduce joins the body results into 'THE QUICK BROWN FOX'. The control token sizes the end-of-stream gather barrier so the net WAITS for the full stream + all bodies before completing. Flip dispatch to parallelBody for the map-style concurrent path (same result).
